name: forge_doctrine_query
description: Query the AVP-Doctrine rule database (71 rules across 9 domains: build / primitives / security / testing / docs / logging / perf / content / accessibility). Returns the full rule triple (statement + rationale + enforcement) for matching rules. Use this when you need to know what a cited rule means, what enforces it, or what rules apply to a domain. Cross-reference with forge_doctrine_for to filter by path applicability.

rule.description: Specific rule id to fetch, e.g. 'prim-009' or 'sec-007'.

search.description: Substring match against rule name + statement.

json.description: Emit JSON instead of human-readable text.
